title: astragalus cuneifolius
intro: Astragalus cuneifolius, also known as the wedge-leaved milk-vetch, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus cuneifolius include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus cuneifolius can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
